zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Kynaston of Estwick於1470年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾紹頓時，他的父親Philip Kynaston52歲，母親Alicia Banastre33歲。他與Helen Kynaston在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1529年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Kynaston of Estwick于1470年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾紹頓时，他的父亲Philip Kynaston52岁，母亲Alicia Banastre33岁。他与Helen Kynaston在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1529年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Charles I of Spain became Emperor Charles V of the Holy Roman Empire.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Kynaston of Estwick was born in 1470, in Shotton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Philip Kynaston, was 52 and his mother, Alicia Banastre, was 33. He married Helen Kynaston in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1529, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Kynaston of Estwick est né en 1470, à Shotton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip Kynaston, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Alicia Banastre, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Helen Kynaston à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1529, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Kynaston of Estwick 1470 in Shotton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip Kynaston 52 und seine Mutter Alicia Banastre 33. Er hat in Shropshire, England Helen Kynaston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1529 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kynaston of Estwick è nato il nel 1470 nel Shotton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Philip Kynaston, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Alicia Banastre, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Helen Kynaston nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1529, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Kynaston of Estwickが1470年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアショットオンで生まれた時，父Philip Kynastonは52歳，母Alicia Banastreは33歳であった。イギリスシュロプシュアイアでHelen Kynastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Kynaston of Estwick(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쇼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Kynaston(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia Banastre(은)는 33세였다. 그는 영국 슈럽실르에서 Helen Kynaston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kynaston of Estwick nasceu em 1470, em Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Philip Kynaston, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Alicia Banastre, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Kynaston em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1529, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Kynaston of Estwick родился в 1470 г. в местности шоттон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Philip Kynaston было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Alicia Banastre, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Kynaston в местности шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1529 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Kynaston of Estwick nació en 1470, en Shotton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Philip Kynaston, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Alicia Banastre, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Helen Kynaston en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1529, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
